title: Bauer Professional 38729 Electric Foot File Hard Skin Remover with Accessories/Rechargeable Callus Pedicure Kit/Waterproof Travel Set
features: ELECTRIC FOOT FILE HARD SKIN REMOVER - With this electric foot file plus accessories, you can achieve a salon-quality pedicure at home. The file effortlessly removes rough, dry skin with three interchangeable roller heads tailored for different exfoliation levels — coarse for hard calluses, regular for newly formed dead skin, and fine for daily foot care. Stay polished and confident wherever you go.

RECHARGEABLE AND LONG LASTING - Enjoy up to 180 minutes of continuous use on a full 3-hour charge. The USB-rechargeable design lets you power up anywhere, while the LED digital display informs you of the remaining battery life.

LED LIGHT AND ADJUSTABLE SPEED -The built-in LED light helps you accurately target and treat rough areas, ensuring you don't miss a spot. With two adjustable speed settings, you can customise your exfoliation to suit your skin's needs.

WATER RESISTANT AND TRAVEL READY -The IPX4 waterproof rating allows for safe use in wet conditions, so you can use it in the bathroom worry-free. The included storage bag and 7-piece pedicure accessory set make it easy to maintain silky smooth feet on the go, perfect for at-home pampering or travel.

BAUER PROFESSIONAL - Bauer Professional is the leading manufacturer of salon quality hair products, as well as beauty and personal care products for both men and women. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description Accessories Included Electronic Foot File Set This premium electric foot file delivers a salon-quality pedicure at home with three interchangeable exfoliating heads. Its rechargeable design is perfect for travel and daily use. The built-in LED light ensures precise care, while two-speed settings allow for customised exfoliation. The included storage bag and 7-piece pedicure accessory set offer everything you need for smooth, beautiful feet wherever you go. Previous page 3 Exfoliation Levels The set includes three interchangeable heads for different levels of exfoliation. Rechargeable Enjoy up to 180 minutes of continuous use on a full 3-hour charge (USB cable included). 2 Speed Levels Choose from two adjustable speed settings to suit your skin's needs. Accessories Included The set includes 7 accessories to achieve a perfect pedicure, plus a cleaning brush and storage bag. Sleek Design The file comes in a timeless chic black and gold design.
